title: Address simplification: Yggdrasil 02xx:: primary unicast, drop ULA support
description: Implement the addressing notes from parent epic. Update all address assignment, prefix config, routing decisions in Zephyr lichen subsys, Rust crates, and specs. Nodes get fe80:: + 02xx:: only. Update lichen_rpl_dodag, IPv6 init, Kconfig options. Must maintain compatibility with existing test vectors where possible. Add new test vectors for global routing. After changes run /codereview 3 times, file findings, fix all.
close_reason: Spec updated to Ed25519-primary no-ULA, yggdrasil-derivation.json created with independent official oracles + cross-validation, schema/test_vectors.py/gateway notes updated, 3 codereview passes completed with all findings fixed, pytest PASS, all consistent
